info.name: MediConnect Backend API (Full)
info.description: Generated from Backend route/controller mapping on 2026-04-16. Includes health, auth, appointments, role applications, diagnostics, medications, notifications, dashboard, medical records, availability, and settings APIs.

request.description: Detailed API health endpoint with uptime.
Patient login. Stores jwtToken and user IDs in collection variables.
Doctor login. Stores jwtToken and doctorId in collection variables.
Lab login. Stores jwtToken and labId in collection variables.
Admin login. Stores jwtToken in collection variables.

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patientId}}",
  "labId": "{{labId}}",
  "testName": "Complete Blood Count",
  "testType": "blood",
  "description": "Baseline CBC panel",
  "urgency": "normal",
  "instructions": "No fasting required",
  "estimatedCompletionDate": "2026-04-22T10:00:00.000Z",
  "appointmentId": "{{appointmentId}}"
}

{
  "filename": "cbc-report.pdf",
  "url": "https://example.com/reports/cbc-report.pdf",
  "fileSize": 245000,
  "mimeType": "application/pdf",
  "findings": "Values within normal range",
  "recommendations": "Maintain hydration",
  "notes": "No immediate concerns"
}

{
  "patientId": "{{patientId}}",
  "medicationName": "Paracetamol",
  "dosage": "500mg",
  "frequency": "daily",
  "frequencyTimes": [
    "08:00",
    "20:00"
  ],
  "duration": {
    "value": 5,
    "unit": "days"
  },
  "startDate": "2026-04-17",
  "instructions": "Take after meal",
  "reason": "Fever and body ache",
  "remindersEnabled": true,
  "appointmentId": "{{appointmentId}}"
}
